title: ESIC Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for 35 Teaching Faculty and Senior Resident Posts
shortInfo: Employees' State Insurance Corporation Medical College & Hospital, Bihta (ESIC) Teaching Faculty and Senior Resident Notification 2026 has been released on the official website. A total of 35 vacancies have been announced through the ESIC Teaching Faculty and Senior Resident Recruitment 2026.

basic_details.job_title: ESIC Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for 35 Teaching Faculty and Senior Resident Posts
basic_details.short_information: Employees' State Insurance Corporation Medical College & Hospital, Bihta (ESIC) Teaching Faculty and Senior Resident Notification 2026 has been released on the official website. A total of 35 vacancies have been announced through the ESIC Teaching Faculty and Senior Resident Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Teaching Faculty: Maximum age of 69 years. Senior Resident: Maximum age of 44 years. Age relaxation of 05 years for SC/ST and 03 years for OBC is applicable.

qualification.education_qualification: As per NMC (MCI) guidelines as on 30.05.2026
qualification.details: Professor, Associate Professor, Assistant Professor, Senior Resident: As per NMC (MCI) guidelines as on 30.05.2026

salary_details.details: Professor: Fixed Basic-₹1,18,500/- Associate Professor: Fixed Basic-₹78,800/- Assistant Professor: Fixed Basic-₹67,700/- Senior Resident: Fixed Basic-₹67,700/-

faq.question: Q1. What is the total number of vacancies announced by ESIC?
faq.answer: ESIC has announced a total of 35 vacancies for Teaching Faculty and Senior Resident posts through this walk-in interview drive.

faq.question: Q2. What is the mode of application for ESIC recruitment?
faq.answer: The mode of application for this recruitment is Walk-in. Candidates need to attend the interview in person on the specified date and time.

faq.question: Q3. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be conducted on 30th May 2026. Candidates should ensure they reach the venue within the reporting time.

faq.question: Q4. What is the educational qualification required for the posts?
faq.answer: The educational qualification required is as per NMC (MCI) guidelines as on 30.05.2026 for all the posts announced.

faq.question: Q5. What is the age limit for Teaching Faculty and Senior Resident posts?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for Teaching Faculty is 69 years, and for Senior Residents, it is 44 years. Age relaxation is applicable for reserved categories.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary offered for the Professor post?
faq.answer: The Professor post offers a fixed basic salary of ₹1,18,500/-.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for SC/ST and Women candidates?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee for SC/ST and Women candidates. General/OBC candidates need to pay Rs. 500/-.

faq.question: Q8. What documents should candidates carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates should carry all original documents, self-attested photocopies, and recent passport-size photographs.

faq.question: Q9. Where is the ESIC Medical College & Hospital located?
faq.answer: ESIC Medical College & Hospital is located in Bihta, Patna, Bihar, with the pincode 801103.

faq.question: Q10. What is the reporting time for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: The reporting time for the walk-in interview is between 09:00 AM and 10:30 AM.
